title: Killer Queen Mewtwo (Cobblemon)
description: Adds a new form of Mewtwo based on Killer Queen from JJBA
body:
Adds a new form of Mewtwo based on Killer Queen from JJBA

**TYPE**
- Psychic/Dark

**STATS**
- HP 100
- ATK 150
- DEF 74
- SPATK 150
- SPDEF 66
- SPE 140

**ABILITY**
- Aftermath
